title: Talk to a human counselor
description: Consent-gated escalation: confirm the user wants a person, then prepare an editable summary for a counselor (the share/consent gate lives on the client).
intent_examples: I want to speak to a person
this is too complicated, I need help

stages.goal: Confirm the user wants to be connected to a human counselor

option_sets.prompt: I can prepare a short summary for a counselor. You'll be able to review and edit it before anything is shared. Would you like to continue?

stages.goal: Prepare an editable, consent-gated summary for the counselor (no raw transcript)
